ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., active, suspended, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the instrument in the market */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., software, biotech) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the instrument's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator or analysis performed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator or analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period over which the analysis was performed (e.g., 10-day, 50-day) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., moving average, exponential smoothing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set up the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert is active (e.g., 1 week, 1 month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the user has (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the query */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* The query string used to retrieve the data */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was executed */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "query_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds it took to execute the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., data access, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission associated with the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who assigned the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current market data entry */,
  "previous_open_price" REAL /* Previous opening price of the instrument */,
  "previous_close_price" REAL /* Previous closing price of the instrument */,
  "previous_low_price" REAL /* Previous lowest price of the instrument */,
  "previous_high_price" REAL /* Previous highest price of the instrument */,
  "previous_volume" INTEGER /* Previous volume of the instrument traded */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical data was recorded */,
  "adjusted_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for historical data */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for historical data */,
  "adjusted_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price for historical data */,
  "adjusted_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price for historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the forecast */,
  "predicted_open_price" REAL /* Predicted opening price of the instrument */,
  "predicted_close_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the instrument */,
  "predicted_low_price" REAL /* Predicted lowest price of the instrument */,
  "predicted_high_price" REAL /* Predicted highest price of the instrument */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* Predicted volume of the instrument traded */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_forecasts_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)
